title: oncidium × hinnus
intro: Oncidium × hinnus is a hybrid orchid species known for its unique and vibrant flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oncidium × hinnus include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
